subcodes.first_line: O Sinai of radiance! Blessed art thou, for thou hast become the dawning-place of the lights of God's love and the dayspring of effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سیناء اشراق خوشا بحال تو که محل تجلی انوار محبت الله گشتی و مطلع سطوع
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
